channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Notorious ‘sandwich attack’ bot Jaredfromsubway.eth exploited for $7.5M
item.description: Jaredfromsubway.eth was responsible for 70% of sandwich attacks on Ethereum between November 2024 and October 2025.

item.title: Ripple CEO Blasts JPMorgan: Intentional misrepresentation to protect profits On June 11, 2026, Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse @bgarlinghouse responded to JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon's opposition to the Clarity Act during an interview on Fox Business. G - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE0zVmc0N3d4RW1sNzRiY2xxdFNJR0lyYjNBN0xnMVk5M0thUlNsMzZvbFNqcTZkaWRrVnRSVzIxMEVRNS1jQVc2elNzSWtyQWlIdXZBaklWdE92b2RuNThZVEIwbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Ripple CEO Blasts JPMorgan: Inte…

item.title: Bitcoin rotations into altcoins collapses: Have altseasons 'disappeared'?
item.description: BTC's crypto market dominance is holding above a key support, signaling Bitcoin may keep absorbing capital from altcoins and delay a broader altseason.

item.title: OpenRouter's Fusion Promises Claude Fable-Level AI for Cheap—Right as Fable 5 Goes Dark
item.description: OpenRouter's compound-model API stacks budget AI models—and beat GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8 outright in benchmark testing.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitdeer has sold every Bitcoin they've mined since February 21st. Excluding their initial holdings, they've now mined and sold over 3,231 $BTC worth over $205M. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE03aUExVlJOMmFaeFNKeG1Wb0wwdnk0UTRKMkp5djdPeFlrS1ZPZkMwaFpYSm5Da3FrbjctbXc1S1BBN0FMQ1AxUzlKM3VMNTBLcmR2Y0g4a0ptN3RJWGVabS10ZDk?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitdeer has sold eve…

item.title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
item.description: As AI-powered security tools become cheaper, faster and more widely available, researchers said they could reshape what the crypto industry considers reasonable due diligence before deploying code, potentially altering expectations for dev…

item.title: Bitcoin Network Activity Is Rising as BTC Falls Nearly 50% Below Peak Price: CryptoQuant
item.description: Activity on the Bitcoin network is surging, CryptoQuant said, but it's not correlating with price movement for its native asset.

item.title: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0
item.description: The European Commission is seeking comment on how it can tweak MiCA, its regulatory framework for the crypto and blockchain industries.

item.title: How STRC lost its par: The timeline behind Strategy's preferred-stock meltdown
item.description: From a bond buyback and dwindling cash reserves to a bitcoin bear market, the sequence of events that turned STRC's par-value challenge into a marketwide debate.

item.title: Pudgy Penguins expands retail footprint with Target trading card rollout
item.description: The NFT-born franchise is bringing its Vibes Series 3 trading cards to Target stores across the US as it expands into physical products and mainstream retail.

item.title: When I gave this speech in October 2022, Bitcoin traded near $20,000, Strategy held 130,000 BTC worth about $2.6 billion, and $MSTR was ~$24 split-adjusted. Weeks later, after Bitcoin fell below $16,000, our debt exceeded the combined value of our BTC a - x.com

item.title: Its been a few years since I owned crypto, but yes I launched pump.fun/coin/5NgDxD1en… after someone created a Glippy meme coin when I complained to @Bencera about Polsia being useless, haha! Earnings will be donated to World Bicylce Relief! More c - x.com

item.title: Philippine SEC signals readiness for RWA tokenization
item.description: Philippine SEC Commissioner Rogelio Quevedo told Cointelegraph that tokenized assets could give Filipinos more legitimate investment options while helping steer them away from scams.

item.title: Crypto kidnappers who robbed a Minnesota family of $8M plead guilty
item.description: Two Texas brothers admitted to holding a Minnesota family at gunpoint and forcing the transfer of $8 million in cryptocurrency.

item.title: At Least Eight Senior Ethereum Foundation Members Have Departed in Five Months According to Unchained, Ethereum Foundation co-executive director and board member Hsiao-Wei Wang has resigned, effective Thursday. The report said the departure co - x.com

item.title: ALL OF CRYPTO - x.com
item.description: ALL OF CRYPTO

item.title: Bitcoin-to-altcoin asset rotation that once fueled alt seasons has basically disappeared. BTC-pair altcoin volume has collapsed since 2021. The era of "alts pumping just because BTC pumps" may be over. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9wVnhlenJ5Q3JuNEY0UWFuYnZWd1NzZTJsMDFvODBYZHE0N2Ixb2R4bHRWTndGZW5WNnRyR29oc1hCU1lsWm42eXFXdEhVdC1OQkJiRFFFcmZHckh2dEhxck93?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin-to-altcoin asset rotation …

item.title: EU AML Rules to Impose €10,000 Cash Payment Cap and Tighter Crypto KYC From 2027 The EU's new anti-money laundering regulation, Regulation (EU) 2024/1624, will apply from July 2027, introducing a bloc-wide €10,000 cap on cash payments for good - x.com

item.title: Sonic token drops 5% as 3 former execs resign from Sonic Labs board
item.description: Andre Cronje, Michael Kong and David Richardson stepped down from the Sonic Labs board on Friday, while Matt Visser has been appointed as CEO, replacing Mitchell Demeter who resigned in February.

item.title: The people who are leaving the Ethereum Foundation are CROPS believers. The problem isn't with the strategy, it's with management. And this exodus of talent is truly bearish for Ethereum, sadly. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1HWTN5REt4RVFZWkN5d3ZGWmZrQkxPdDZ1Q0JNdHVVX1dTdjlYQkdualhETG1xQk92RnBpVjhmcWZVZG1saC1XcGprOFNURS1EejQ2VTdMMk5TTjU1?oc=5" target="_blank">The people who are leaving the Ethereum Fo…

item.title: 🐋 LATEST: A Bitcoin whale sold 800 BTC worth $50.2 million after holding for 7 months, realizing a $35.3 million loss. - x.com

item.title: i think if somebody made a cartoon tv show about crypto twitter the past five years or so it'd be pretty entertaining - x.com

item.title: Prediction markets hit a record $10.8 billion in weekly trading volume in the week ending June 15 — their biggest week ever. Several big events coincided that contributed to the all-time high: the SpaceX IPO, a U.S.-Iran peace deal, the NBA Finals, the Stanley - x.com

item.title: Charles Schwab to enter prediction markets with S&P 500 wagers: WSJ
item.description: The offering from the financial services company will reportedly only include yes-or-no bets on whether the S&P 500 closes above or below a target price.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: $13B Bitcoin options expiry looms: Will bulls endure more pain in June?
item.description: Bitcoin bears hold the upper hand in the upcoming Bitcoin options expiry, a potentially early warning that more BTC downside could unfold.

item.title: Trump's family crypto business is expected to soon be allowed to operate like a bank — a decision, made by the Trump administration, that would give U.S. companies a new route to steer money to the president. "For the first time in history, a president is leanin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5WZ2FQSklvOGhCdzRCUl9zYlRYNHZTalhPckxMLWd1VGkyd3NzeTllcGstQUtvTDAyMzVjTFFpdWVOdnh2ei1sS2p2T1NmSkVnM1RKOXQzRFRGWFROR0JMZmZaZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Trump's family crypto business i…

item.title: WhiteBIT secures MiCA license in Austria ahead of July 1 EU deadline
item.description: The Austrian authorization gives WhiteBIT access to the EU's unified crypto framework, which will require exchanges to hold MiCA licenses or stop serving clients after July 1.

item.title: Charles Schwab Planning to Roll Out S&P 500 Prediction Markets With Cboe: WSJ
item.description: Global financial institution Charles Schwab is the latest firm hoping to steal a piece of the growing prediction market pie.

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Bitcoin traders are eyeing a potential sweep below $59,000, but declining exchange inflows suggest selling pressure may be easing, according to CryptoQuant. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBTeENpUTRuaGRqZ1dyc1FSQXZ0N256YTRvVmVRT3NiZm9xRmtoandmdXRPSGFzNXVJajBTZlFZLWJ3N1J4ZkRnLVpiYUlGYVlDVnhYRVF5RElsZnVQZ1A5OVJPMHk?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Bitcoin traders are e…

item.title: House Republican Introduces Insider Trading Bill to Ban Lawmaker Prediction Market Bets
item.description: The bill is meant to curb potential insider trading, blocking lawmakers and family members from policy-related prediction market bets.

item.title: Bitcoin (-28%) and Gold (-2%) are the two worst performing major assets so far in 2026. This is something we haven't seen before in any calendar year. Video: youtube.com/watch?v=sMF_Nh… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE92MXNkYWxINmRqNnlzQjBoV2xhNFJaRUIxMTM0Mm5QYUtiYmQ0RHgtRTBMbVVWOVYyNEtxU1hLOEhIVjJ2WEhQNUs3OTVDall1QTZhZWx6ZHk3dG1YMWN3SnQ2aFY1dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin (-28%) and Gold (-2%…

item.title: Republican lawmaker proposes prediction markets insider trading ban, not including White House officials
item.description: The bill did not specifically bar members of the US Congress from using the platforms or making sports bets, but prohibited policy wagers.

item.title: GPT-5.6 Rumors Heat Up as Users Swear ChatGPT Suddenly Got Smarter
item.description: Many AI users are convinced that OpenAI is quietly running GPT-5.6 inside ChatGPT. OpenAI isn't confirming anything.

item.title: Schwab to join prediction markets race with S&P 500 event-based options: WSJ
item.description: The planned offering would let customers bet on index moves as Coinbase and Robinhood expand in the sector.

item.title: The 5 Largest Publicly Traded Solana Treasury Firms
item.description: Institutions are gobbling up Solana for their balance sheets. These are the top publicly traded treasuries.

item.title: Bitcoin traders expect new lows but data cautions against overly bearish bias
item.description: A concentrated liquidity pocket below $59,000 raises the chance of a Bitcoin price sell-off to new 2026 lows, but data suggests bulls will absorb the dip.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Is AI the exit strategy for miners?
item.description: Bitcoin miners double down on AI, tokenized RWAs top $43 billion, Ripple strengthens its African payments network and Sam Bankman-Fried loses his appeal.

item.title: Strive Blames Leverage Liquidations After SATA and Bitcoin Giant Strategy's STRC Plunge
item.description: The disastrous day for Bitcoin firms' preferred equity offerings may have been due to unwinding of leveraged positions in STRC and SATA.

item.title: JUST IN: While everyone else is selling, Morgan Stanely's Bitcoin ETF bought over $25 million in BTC so far this week 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE0wb01rTk9HQW41Y3AxTG5mSTVnb2FTS1ZfeUFfdVFNM3dYQTZmMHFBVE1mUFAzS1VhTGl3X0YxWmgwMkNFbG1KZW5XV0hrTFZLWUs4Zmh6ZlFPcVhpYkxMSDZRX2JzQVU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: While everyone els…

item.title: Amazon Won't Release Sam Altman Film 'Artificial' Following $50 Billion OpenAI Investment
item.description: Amazon is pulling out of "Artificial," a film about Sam Altman's brief ouster from OpenAI, not long after investing $50 billion in the firm.

item.title: Andrew Tate loses nearly $86,000 longing and shorting Bitcoin
item.description: Andrew Tate’s Hyperliquid wallet shows over $803,800 in all-time perps losses after repeated crypto WLFI liquidations.

item.title: Aave survived $8.45B in withdrawals, but risk questions remain
item.description: Aave handled $8.45 billion in withdrawals without freezing funds, but the episode raised fresh questions about hidden risks in DeFi lending.

item.title: Anime Girls Could Steal Your Crypto as Wallpaper Malware Targets Steam Gamers
item.description: Researchers found malicious Wallpaper Engine downloads on Steam Workshop distributing infostealers, backdoors, and account-hijacking malware.

item.title: Bitcoin taps $63K on Juneteenth as July Fed rate-hike odds near 40%
item.description: Bitcoin price action avoided volatility but failed to bounce from local lows after a hawkish Fed meeting and posturing over Strait of Hormuz control from Iran.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 FBI Director Kash Patel says the FBI will find crypto scammers and "will bring you to justice! 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9Iaml2Y2plQ29pU3FwQ0lBQks5ZW9NSEl4bHN1ai1uOXdaT1lEM09HN3FMX3JqUy1FdUV5R3JGQkFheDlLNnh2bkpXTVR1RnFmNzEzeWZpOW0zblVGTHM2YnBLODRSSFk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 FBI Director …

item.title: Kalshi in early IPO talks with investment banks: Report
item.description: The prediction market platform is reportedly exploring a public listing after surpassing $2 billion in annualized revenue as sports contracts face mounting legal scrutiny.

item.title: Binance’s MiCA fight raises questions over ECB influence
item.description: Lawyers say MiCA rules do not bar the European Central Bank from communicating with national regulators during the application process, though crypto licensing decisions remain with member states.

item.title: Ethereum faces core development funding crisis, former contributor warns
item.description: The warning comes as the Ethereum Foundation reduces spending, adjusts its treasury strategy and undergoes a wave of leadership departures.

item.title: GoMining challenges Jack Dorsey's Square with payments system designed around bitcoin
item.description: GoMining unveiled a software development kit and programmable access for its bitcoin payment protocol GoBTC Pay, allowing merchants to accept BTC for everyday purchases.

item.title: INSIGHT: A former Ethereum Foundation contributor warns $ETH's core development ecosystem could face a funding crisis within 3-9 months as the EF scales back spending. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9hZWQ2Y25QekZQNjJScUhnOHlMNzl4UUFhVkI0b3dFNjdCbVZ2X2EyU2FjU3NmdGZ2bXZqaVdLYjc4ZEpDUUI3X2t3ZGVmdHVrVXNRN2tZU0tfM2ZBYlE?oc=5" target="_blank">INSIGHT: A former Ethereum Foundation c…

item.title: Franklin Templeton proposes new ETFs that turn corporate dividends into bitcoin
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 19, 2026

item.title: Texas Brothers Plead Guilty to $8M Armed Crypto Kidnapping
item.description: Isiah and Raymond Garcia held a Minnesota family at gunpoint for eight hours and forced the father to transfer over $8 million in crypto.

item.title: Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses as bitcoin wilts for 4th straight day
item.description: Concerns about STRC, the dividend-paying preferred stock from Strategy continue to dominate market sentiment.

item.title: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
item.description: The asset manager's two proposed "Bitcoin DRIP" funds would hold U.S. stocks and reinvest dividends into Bitcoin, a novel ETF structure.

item.title: Digital credit market hit by huge selloff as Strive CEO blames leverage liquidations
item.description: Matt Cole says forced selling from leveraged investors pushed STRC and SATA sharply lower before both rebounded.

item.title: Microsoft found malware that hijacks crypto wallets and spreads through USB sticks
item.description: The software intercepts shortcut files and directs them to install a worm that harvests private keys from the Windows clipboard and inserts its own destination wallet addresses when it detects a transfer.

item.title: Markets are closed today. Volatility is never easy. Bitcoin keeps working. So do we. Thank you for your support. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBENlpESjJPODFwMXdicklQTDY3alR4X2lUSTRxM1NXQWY3NncwSnZ2YmRpLWc2YTVMaDRUdWRXdDQyTTBEcjN5bmljb2xaMDVuOENCY2FTZ2ZIUFU?oc=5" target="_blank">Markets are closed today. Volatility is nev…

item.title: XRP falls 3% after losing $1.15 support as breakout attempt fades
item.description: Heavy selling pushed XRP back below a key support zone, reinforcing a downtrend that has repeatedly stalled rallies near $1.25.
